content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLM output refinement can be significantly enhanced by integrating multi-perspective inconsistency checking from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a two-layer self-improvement system that maintains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while addressing its blind spot of missing diverse critical feedback. This combined framework leverages the iterative refinement loop of Self-Refine as the outer loop, and uses Self-Contrast style inconsistent perspective checking from general LLM self-reflection research as the inner self-feedback generator to catch errors a single self-feedback perspective would miss.
